snippet.title: Kâbe'de Hacılar Hû Der Allah | Abdurrahman Önül & Celal Karatüre
snippet.description:
Produksiyon :Berekat Yayın Yapım ve Dağıtım Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Prodüktör : Murat Avanoğlu
Yapım Asistanı: Kazım Kadri Utangan
Solist: Abdurrahman Önül | Celal Karatüre
Söz - Beste: Abdurrahman Önül
Stüdyo: Peker Kardeşler ( Yunus, Yücel, Yasin Peker Kardeşler)
Aranjör: Yunus Peker
Mastering: Muammer Tokmak
Zikir: Hasan Koşucu 
Perküsyon: İsa Punar
Klip Yönetmeni: Enes Şener
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Emin Şener
Grafik: Beytullah Altınkaya
Ney:Burak Yılmazoğlu
Işık: Taha Sağlam
Işık Asistanı: Ali Sofuoğlu
Asistan: Emre Yeşilkaya

Spotify'da dinlemek için: https://bit.ly/kabedehacilar
iTunes'da dinlemek için: https://apple.co/4kLLDgK

Bir tarafta sokaklarda 7’den 70’e herkesin diline dolanan Kâbe'de Hacılar İlahisi ile tanınan Celal Karatüre…
Diğer tarafta 25 yıldır ilahileriyle gönüllerde taht kuran ve Kâbe'de Hacılar İlahisinin söz ve beste sahibi Abdurrahman Önül…
Ve şimdi…
Yılların emaneti, milyonların özlemiyle yeniden hayat buluyor.
“Kâbe’de Hacılar” artık sadece bir ilahi değil;
Geçmişle bugünün kavuşması.
Hatıralarla yeni neslin buluşması.
Sokak ruhuyla manevî derinliğin birleşmesi.
Bir neslin gözyaşlarıyla büyüttüğü eser,
Bugünün en güçlü yorumuyla yeniden yükseliyor.
Bu düet konuşulacak.
Bu düet paylaşılacak.
Bu düet ezbere söylenecek.

Kabe de hacılar hu der Allah
Yer gök inim inim iniler Allah
Melekler defterin yeniler Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin yolları taşlıdır Allah
Hacıların gözleri yaşlıdır Allah
Dervişlerin ciğeri ateşlidir Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin yolları çukurdur Allah
Hacıların işleri zikirdir Allah
Mevlasına her dem şükürdür Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin örtüsü yeşil Allah
Gün doğmadan ışır Allah
Hepimizi Kabene çağır Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah
İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabe'de Hacılar - Abdurrahman Önül Kaydı
https://youtu.be/YEzsjF1S7C0

#kabedehacılar  #celalkaratüre #abdurrahmanönül

snippet.title: *NSYNC - Bye Bye Bye // Lyrics / Sub. Español
snippet.description:
🍒 CherryLady 🍒
Bienvenid@ a un viaje directo a la nostalgia ✨
Si amás la música con historia, el estilo retro y esa sensación de “antes todo era distinto”, este canal es para vos.
👉 Seguime para no perderte ningún video

🎶*NSYNC - Bye Bye Bye // Lyrics / Sub. Español

🎤 *NSYNC:
📌 https://nsync.lnk.to/followWI
📌 https://nsync.lnk.to/followFI
📌 https://nsync.lnk.to/followII
📌 https://nsync.lnk.to/followSI

🔔 Activá la campanita para no perderte ningún estreno.
Letra:
Hey, hey
Bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Bye, bye
(Oh, oh)
I, I'm doing this tonight
You're probably gonna start a fight
I know this can't be right
Hey, baby, come on
I loved you endlessly
When you weren't there for me
So now it's time to leave and make it alone
I know that I can't take no more
It ain't no lie
I want to see you out that door
Baby, bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Don't wanna be a fool for you
Just another player in your game for two
You may hate me, but it ain't no lie
Baby, bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Don't really want to make it tough
I just wanna tell you that I've had enough
It might sound crazy, but it ain't no lie
Baby, bye, bye, bye
You just hit me with the truth
Now, girl, you're more than welcome to
So, give me one good reason
Baby, come on
I've lived for you and me
And now I really come to see
That life would be much better
Once you're gone
I know that I can't take no more
It ain't no lie
I want to see you out that door
Baby, bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Don't wanna be a fool for you
Just another player in your game for two
You may hate me, but it ain't no lie
Baby, bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Don't really want to make it tough
I just wanna tell you that I've had enough
It might sound crazy, but it ain't no lie
Baby, bye, bye, bye
I'm giving up, I know for sure
I don't want to be the reason for your love, no more
(Bye, bye)
I'm checking out, I'm signing off
I don't want to be the loser and I've had enough
I don't wanna be your fool in this game for two
So I'm leaving you behind (bye, bye, bye)
I don't want to make it tough (make it tough)
But I've had enough
(Bye, bye) and it ain't no lie
Bye, bye (baby)
Don't wanna be a fool for you (I don't wanna be a fool)
Just another player in your game for two
I don't want to be your fool but it ain't no lie
Baby, bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)
Don't really want to make it tough (I don't wanna make it tough)
I just wanna tell you that I've had enough (but I had enough)
It might sound crazy but it ain't no lie
Bye, bye, bye (bye, bye)

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] Girl Rules กฎหลัก...ห้ามรักเธอ
snippet.description:
เรื่องราวความวุ่นวายของความสัมพันธ์ในกลุ่มแซฟฟิก ที่เริ่มต้นจากการกลับมาของ “แบมบี้” (ฟิล์ม รชานันท์) แฟนเก่าของ “ปริม” (น้ำตาล ทิพนารี) ที่เข้ามาในฐานะลูกค้าของบริษัททำโฆษณาที่ปริม และ “มิน” (วิว เบญญาภา) เปิดร่วมกัน โดยมีสไตลิสต์สาวรุ่นน้องของปริมอย่าง “กอหญ้า” (เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์) และนางแบบสาวสวยมากเสน่ห์อย่าง “ชาช่า” (มิ้ลค์ พรรษา) รวมถึงตากล้องสาวประจำบาร์ที่มินชอบไปอย่าง “แพรว” (มิ้ม รัตนวดี) เข้ามาร่วมโปรเจกต์ด้วย ติดตามความสัมพันธ์วุ่นวายของกลุ่มสาวแซฟฟิกที่จะมาทำให้คุณได้รู้ว่ากฎของความรักบางอย่างมันก็ต้องทำตาม ไม่งั้นจะเจอกับเรื่องวุ่นวายใจเหมือนกับแก๊งนี้ ใน “GIRL RULES กฎหลัก…ห้ามรักเธอ” ทุกวันจันทร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 และดูออนไลน์ เวลา 21:30 น. บนแอป iQIYI และเว็บ iQ.com ที่เดียวเท่านั้น เริ่ม 9 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ทิชากร ภูเขาทอง 

รายชื่อนักแสดง
น้ำตาล ทิพนารี วีรวัฒโนดม  รับบท  ปริม 
ฟิล์ม รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์  รับบท  แบมบี้
มิ้ลค์ พรรษา วอสเบียน  รับบท  ชาช่า
เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์ ลิ้มปติยากร  รับบท  กอหญ้า
วิว เบญญาภา จีนประสม  รับบท  มิน
มิ้ม รัตนวดี วงค์ทอง   รับบท  แพรว
ไซซี รัตท์ริชา ประภากิติ  รับบท  แอรี่
ยู่ยี่ อลิสา อินทุสมิต   รับบท  ญานิน
มิ้น มิณฑิตา วัฒนกุล   รับบท  เจ๊แอ๊น

🎵Künstlerischer Hinweis
Meine Remixe verwenden Acapellas und Beats, um neue Versionen bestehender Rap-Songs zu kreieren.
Sie sind inoffizielle, kreative Neuinterpretationen und stehen in keiner Verbindung zu den Originalkünstlern, deren Labels oder offiziellen Releases.
Ziel ist es, dem Original eine neue Atmosphäre und Klangsprache zu geben – als Teil der Remix-Kultur.

💼Monetarisierung & Rechteklärung
Die Monetarisierung technischer Inhalte erfolgt ggf. automatisch im Rahmen der Plattformrichtlinien.
Einnahmen durch Content-ID-Systeme werden direkt den jeweiligen Rechteinhabern zugewiesen.
Der Upload ist als künstlerische Neuinterpretation gedacht – nicht als kommerzielle Nutzung des Originals.

Alle Rechte an Musik, Text und Tonaufnahme liegen uneingeschränkt bei den jeweiligen Rechteinhabern und den Labels der folgenden Originalwerke:

– Sido (Stimme entnommen aus "Du liebst mich nicht")
– Metrickz (Stimme entnommen aus "Neue Stadt")
– Kontra K (Stimme entnommen aus "Kaputt")


Diese Version versteht sich als Hommage mit großem Respekt gegenüber dem Original.

📩 Für Rechteinhaber & Labels
Ich bin offen für offizielle Remixe, Releases oder Kooperationen.
Kontakt: Instagram DM oder E-Mail (siehe Kanalinfo).


🎚️ Remix & Sounddesign:
Lighteye Beatz

🙏 Danke für deinen Support!


Dieses emotionale Video begleitet die Künstler durch weite Landschaften und am Meer, während sie über eine zerbrochene Beziehung rappen. Es thematisiert das Verarbeiten einer Trennung und gibt Impulse für die innere Heillung, die durch tiefen Liebeskummer entstehen kann. Der Prozess des loslassen beziehung ist oft mit starken emotionale schmerzen verbunden und kann sich anfühlen, als hätte man ein gebrochenes herz. Doch auch nach dem verlassen werden gibt es Wege zur Heilung.

The DJ got us falling in love again (L-love again-gain, oh yeah)

The DJ got us falling in love again (L-love again-gain Usher, don't lie! haha, ohh)

Hear no evil, I speak no evil, I see no evil

That's how we roll

Mami got me twisted like a dreadlock

Mami on fire, pshh, red hot
Bada bing, bada boom
Mr. Worldwide as I step in the room
I'm a hustler, baby, but that you knew
And tonight it's just me and you, dale
[Chorus: Usher & Pitbull]
'Cause baby, tonight
The DJ got us falling in love again
(Mr. Worldwide, yeah, yeah, let's take over the world, haha)
Yeah, baby, tonight (Hahahaha, yeah man)
The DJ got us falling in love, falling in love, o-oh
(Dale) (Let go)
So dance, dance like it's the last, last night
Of your life, life, gon' get you right (Woo!)
(Come on, come on)

The DJ got us falling in love again

(Yeah, somebody get the DJ's up, somebody get the DJ's up)
The DJ got us falling in love again (L-love again-gain)
(Somebody get the hands up, get the hands up, get your hands up, aw, come on)
So dance, dance like it's the last, last night
Of your life, life, Gon' get you right

The DJ got us falling in love again (L-love again-gain)

snippet.title: CG5 - Wrong Side Out (from Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5)
snippet.description:

Song by @CG5
Guitars by Josh Locke

Animation & Production Team:

Kaylin Radomski (https://x.com/KaylinYGO)
Director, Storyboarding, Animator, Layout, Cleanup, and Lighting

Edil Ayazbayev ( @Mango5_)

Animator and Layout

Animator, Layout, Cleanup, and Rigging

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I made us a home,
From what was once a prison.
So if you share my vision,
Thank me, dear, for paradise.

And in the hour of joy,
Don’t bite the hand that feeds you, child.
Or do I have to fix you?
‘Cuz once I do, you’ll never die.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

(A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.
A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.)

I gave us new life,
Through reanimation.
But you brought an outlier to my equation,
So shall we see what you look like?

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.
I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

You can’t burn down all that we are,
Or turn around,
This is the start of my immortal perfection.
And I’m your God.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
